name: Comparative Effects of Sunscreens Alone vs Sunscreens Plus DNA Repair Enzymes in Patients With Actinic Keratosis: Clinical and Molecular Findings from a 6-Month, Randomized, Clinical Study
short_name: Sunscreen plus DNA repair enzymes AK study
summary: A 6-month randomized clinical study comparing sunscreen plus topical DNA repair enzymes against sunscreen alone in patients with actinic keratosis.
